caption: The video appears to be a presentation slide titled "The elephant in the mind." It features an image of a large elephant with a person sitting on its back, holding a stick. The background is a cloudy sky, giving a dramatic and somewhat ominous feel. On the left side of the slide, there is a label "general threat" connected to the elephant by two arrows: a solid red arrow pointing directly at the elephant and a dashed red arrow curving around it. This visual metaphor suggests that the elephant represents a significant or overarching issue that needs attention, possibly indicating how general threats can impact or influence larger concepts or situations. The slide seems to be part of a discussion or lecture aimed at addressing complex problems or ideas symbolized by the elephant.
